app.name: doctorVet
app.otherClinicNote: You're currently working inside a clinic you joined — your own clinic's data is safe and temporarily hidden.
app.leaveClinic: Leave and return to my clinic

login.heroTitle: Every pet deserves a record that travels with them.
login.trust: Trusted by veterinarians, loved by pet owners.
login.f1Body: A single QR your pet carries to any clinic, anywhere.
login.f2Body: Vitals, vaccines, treatments and history — always in sync.
login.f3Body: You decide what each clinic can see. Always.

common.demoMode: Demo mode — data is stored only in this browser

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.body: An unexpected error interrupted this screen. Your data is safe — try reloading.
errors.timeout: The request timed out — check your connection and try again.
errors.duplicate: This conflicts with an existing record — a cage or number may already be in use.
errors.linkMissing: A linked record is missing. Refresh and try again.
errors.invalidValue: Some values are invalid. Please review and try again.
errors.unauthorized: Your session may have expired. Sign in again and retry.
errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large (max {{mb}} MB). Try a smaller image.
errors.uploadFailed: Upload failed — check your connection and try again.

campaigns.title: WhatsApp Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Reach clients via direct WhatsApp links — no API cost, no ban risk.
campaigns.templateHint: Pick a ready template or write your own. Tap a variable to insert it.
campaigns.msgBirthday: Hello {{اسم_المالك}}! 🎉 {{اسم_العيادة}} clinic wishes {{اسم_الحيوان}} a very happy birthday! 🐾
campaigns.msgVaccine: Hello {{اسم_المالك}}, a reminder from {{اسم_العيادة}} clinic: {{اسم_الحيوان}}'s vaccination is due. Please contact us to book a visit. 🐾
campaigns.msgDeworming: Hello {{اسم_المالك}}, a friendly reminder from {{اسم_العيادة}} clinic: {{اسم_الحيوان}}'s deworming dose is due. Please contact us to arrange it. 🐛
campaigns.msgOffer: Hello {{اسم_المالك}}! 🎁 {{اسم_العيادة}} clinic has a special offer for you and {{اسم_الحيوان}}. Contact us for details.
campaigns.queueEmpty: Select clients from the list to build the send queue.

retail.title: Retail & Sales
retail.subtitle: Walk-in sales, invoicing & receipts — for this clinic only.
retail.noServices: No services yet — add them in Settings → Services.
retail.noDebts: No debts — every invoice is fully settled.
retail.settleQuestion: How much is the client paying today?
retail.willSettle: This will settle the invoice in full
retail.cartEmpty: Add products to start a sale.
retail.searchInvoices: Search by customer, phone or invoice #…
retail.noInvoices: No invoices yet. Completed sales appear here.
retail.confirmRefund: Refund this sale and return its items to stock?
retail.confirmDelete: Permanently delete this invoice? This cannot be undone.
retail.deleteAdminOnly: Only clinic admins can permanently delete invoices.
retail.noPeriodSales: No sales in this period yet.
retail.popupBlockedHint: Your browser blocked the print window — enable pop-ups for this site.
retail.debtNameGate: A debt needs a name — enter the customer's name first
retail.debtNeedsName: ⚠️ Enter the customer's name (the "Customer" box above) so the debt is recorded under it
retail.debtOnName: The debt will be recorded under: {{name}} · shown in the Debts log
retail.medSyncFailed: Sale saved, but the pet's medical record couldn't be updated
retail.noDebtYet: Lower the paid amount or tap Half/Quarter — the rest is recorded as debt automatically
retail.enterSalePriceDesc: Set a positive price before adding to the cart.
retail.activePetHint: New meds/vaccines are recorded on the highlighted pet
retail.petSearchPh: Search by pet or owner name…

promos.title: Offers management
promos.subtitle: Create Mix & Match offers — buy N items from a subcategory for a fixed bundle price. Applied automatically at the till.
promos.name: Offer name
promos.invalid: Enter a name, subcategory and quantity (at least 1).
promos.empty: No offers yet. Create one above.

consent.title: Consent forms
consent.popupBlockedHint: Your browser blocked the print window — enable pop-ups for this site.

medentry.notesPlaceholder: Observations, findings, owner instructions… saved to the patient's file.
medentry.vaccinePh: Select a vaccine for this species…
medentry.notePh: e.g. given with food, mild reaction observed…

services.title: Services & non-barcode items
services.subtitle: CBC tests, X-rays, consultations, grooming… these appear in the POS for one-tap billing.
services.empty: No categories yet. Create one to start adding services.

pos.title: Inventory
pos.subtitle: Stock, products & low-stock alerts — for this clinic only.
pos.scanReady: Scan a barcode to add it
pos.scanHint: Point the scanner anywhere on this screen — no need to click first.
pos.searchAdd: Or search a product to add manually…
pos.cartEmpty: Scan or add products to start a sale.
pos.noProducts: No products yet. Add your first one.
pos.name: Product name
pos.noSales: No sales yet. Completed checkouts appear here.
pos.subUnitHint: Sell the whole box or split it (pill, strip, ml…) from the same stock.
pos.subUnitNeedsCount: Enter the number of units per box (greater than zero)

select.title: Choose how to continue
select.sub: This account has access to both workspaces.
select.greeting: Welcome back, {{name}} — this account has both workspaces.

settings.title: Doctor settings
settings.subtitle: Adjust the medical reading ranges used to flag values during examination.
settings.dialCodeHint: Applied automatically to phone numbers and search. Edit if your clinic is in another country.
settings.clinicNameHint: Shown on invoice headers, consent forms and WhatsApp messages instead of the app name.
settings.identityHint: The clinic's name and logo appear on invoices, consent forms and as a watermark; social handles appear at the bottom.
settings.cashierHint: Extra point-of-sale features — off by default, enable only what suits your clinic.
settings.preSalePrint: Print the invoice before completing the sale
settings.preSalePrintHint: Adds a "pro-forma" print button to the sale screen so the customer can review the bill before paying — nothing is recorded as an invoice and stock is untouched.

auth.doctorQrHint: Veterinarians sign in instantly by scanning their staff QR — no typing between rooms.
auth.welcomeMsg: Your account is ready, {{name}}. Let's get started.
auth.emailTaken: A clinic with this email already exists.
auth.clinicHint: Each clinic keeps its own catalog, ranges and settings — fully independent.
auth.ownerHint: Your pets, appointments and records — and a personal QR you show at any clinic.
auth.accountExists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.resetEmailHint: Enter your account email and we'll send a verification code.
auth.demoCodeNote: Demo (no real email): your code is {{code}}
auth.resetDone: Password updated. You can sign in now.
auth.noAccountEmail: No account found with this email.
auth.emailExists: This email already has an account. Sign in to add {{role}} access.
auth.roleAddFailed: Signed in, but couldn't add the new role.
auth.codeInvalid: Invalid or expired code — request a new one.
auth.notConfirmed: Please verify your email before signing in.
auth.networkError: Network error — check your connection and try again.
auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.genericError: Couldn't sign in. Please try again.
auth.checkEmailBody: We've sent a confirmation link to
auth.checkEmailHint: Open it to activate your account — you'll be signed in automatically.
auth.checkSpam: Can't find it? Check your spam or promotions folder.
auth.clinicSub: Run your clinic with doctorVet — records, reception and treatments.
auth.forgotSub: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
auth.ownerSub: Manage your pets with doctorVet — all in one place.
auth.pwTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.resetSent: Check your email for a password-reset link.
auth.setNewPasswordSub: Choose a new password for your account.

dashboard.noPets: No pets yet. Add your first companion.

pet.name: Name
pet.markingsPlaceholder: Coat colour & pattern, unique markings, scars, distinguishing features…

diet.therapeuticHint: Diet prescribed for a medical condition

edu.title: Learn & care
edu.subtitle: Owner guides
edu.disclaimer: General guidance only — always follow your veterinarian's specific advice for your pet.

passport.title: Digital Pet Passport
passport.ownerViewOnly: You can view your pet's health record. Treatments and vaccinations are managed by the clinic.

account.title: My account
account.subtitle: Your contact details — used by any clinic you visit.
account.infoSubtitle: The account currently signed in. You can edit your name and phone number.
account.name: Full name
account.emailLocked: Email can't be changed here — it is your sign-in identifier.
account.qrHint: Show this QR at any clinic to share your pets — separate from each pet's passport.

qr.title: Universal passport QR
qr.subtitle: Any subscribed clinic can scan this to open {{name}}'s full chart — anywhere.
qr.shareText: {{name}}'s doctorVet passport — scan to view the full medical record at any clinic. Code: {{code}}
qr.scanHint: Enter the passport code from the owner's QR to open the medical chart.
qr.noEmail: No shared pets for that email.
qr.notFound: No pet found for that code.

media.viewerHint: Scroll to zoom · drag to pan · Esc to close
media.compareHint: Select photos to compare side by side over time.

reading.individualHint: Set ranges for this individual animal. Defaults come from the {{species}} type.

chart.title: Unified medical chart
chart.subtitle: Patient: {{name}} · Serial: {{serial}}
chart.hint: One chronological record unifying treatments, vaccinations and clinical notes — newest first.
chart.workspaceHint: Add treatments, vaccines and notes — and track them all in one chronological record, newest first.
chart.empty: No medical events recorded for this patient yet.

notes.title: Clinical notes
notes.placeholder: Write a clinical note about this case…
notes.empty: No notes yet for this patient.

claim.hint: Enter the animal's serial number to add an existing pet to your profile.
claim.notFound: No animal found with that serial.

booking.title: Book an appointment
booking.noDoctors: No doctors available for this service.
booking.symptomsPlaceholder: Describe symptoms, e.g. limping after walks…
booking.bookedHint: The clinic will confirm shortly. You'll get reminders 24h and 1h before.
booking.slotTaken: That slot was just taken — pick another.

dash.emptyToday: No appointments scheduled for today yet.

birthdays.title: Upcoming birthdays
birthdays.greeting: Hello! {{clinic}} clinic wishes {{name}} a very happy birthday! 🐾🎉

dash.loadError: Couldn't reach the server — it may be paused or your connection dropped.

breeds.title: Custom breeds
breeds.subtitle: Add breeds specific to your clinic — they appear in the breed picker for the chosen species.
breeds.name: Breed name

reception.title: Master calendar
reception.opsSubtitle: Manage medical cases and boarding — drag to reschedule or change status.
reception.moveError: Couldn't update the case — please try again.
reception.addError: Couldn't add the reminder — try again.
reception.addReminder: Add a reminder for this day
reception.dayEmpty: No reminders or cases on this day
reception.doseDue: Dose due now — mark as given
reception.doseError: Couldn't record the dose — try again.
reception.pickDay: Pick a day from the calendar
reception.pickDayHint: to see its reminders and cases
reception.searchPh: Search: pet name, number, owner name or phone…

treatment.title: Treatment sheet
treatment.subtitle: Continued / multi-day treatment record
treatment.locked: Treatment is locked. Re-admit this animal to the daily case record to add or change treatment.

newCase.title: New case (walk-in)
newCase.subtitle: Register a new owner & animal without an appointment.
newCase.diagnosisHint: Pick a suggestion, or type any diagnosis and press Enter.
newCase.serialNotFound: No animal found with that serial.
newCase.toBoardingCareDesc: The pet stays in the clinic under active medical care — appears in both the Boarding and Medical care columns.
newCase.toReleaseDesc: Seen and sent home — logged with today's date
newCase.toRecordDesc: Register the patient & owner in Clinic Records without adding them to today's queue — ready for future visits.
newCase.saveError: Couldn't save the registration. Please try again.
newCase.createdLog: Added to the daily treatment log.

records.title: Clinic records
records.searchCrm: Search owner, pet, phone or file ID…
records.movementHint: Chronological log of animals entering and leaving the clinic.
records.search: Search by animal, owner, or phone…
records.editAllPets: Applies to all {{n}} animals on this owner.
records.saveError: Couldn't save the animal. Please try again.
records.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this pet? This action cannot be undone.
records.moveError: Couldn't move the animal. Please try again.
records.noOwnerMatch: No matching owner — add a new one below.
records.logHint: All registered patients, grouped by owner. Cases admitted to the clinic appear here with their dates.
records.phoneHint: Phone search ignores spaces and country code (default {{code}}) — just type the digits.

meds.title: Clinic medications
meds.subtitle: Add medications to the clinic list. Anything a doctor prescribes that isn't listed is added automatically.
meds.name: Medication name

vax.title: Clinic vaccinations
vax.subtitle: Add clinic/brand vaccines. Clients only ever see the scientific name.
vax.name: Vaccine (clinic / brand name)

consult.title: Consultation
consult.markHint: Draw on the body to mark the site

branches.addFail: Couldn't add the branch — try again.
branches.dup: A branch with this name already exists.
branches.firstNote: The "Main branch" will also be created automatically and will hold all your existing data.
branches.hint: Add your locations to enable the branch switcher — each branch sees its own cases, and all existing data stays under the main branch.
branches.namePh: New branch name — e.g. Mansour branch
branches.single: Your clinic currently runs as a single branch — add another to enable multi-branch.
branches.title: Clinic branches

petSales.title: Previous sales
petSales.empty: No sales recorded for this pet.

clinicSync.savedLocal: Saved on this device — we'll retry syncing later.

presence.title: Current location in the clinic
presence.hint: Pick a status to move the animal — the master calendar updates instantly.
presence.updateFail: Couldn't update the animal's location — try again.

outcome.title: How did {{name}} leave?
outcome.sub: Record how the case ended — shown on the card and in the log.
outcome.recoveredSub: Left the clinic in good health
outcome.saveFail: Couldn't save the outcome — try again.

rpt.title: Reports & Analytics
rpt.subtitle: A complete analytics dashboard for the clinic's financial and operational performance.
rpt.noAccess: You don't have permission to view reports. Contact the clinic manager.
rpt.shiftHint: Leave blank to include the whole day.
rpt.cmpHint: Shows a strip with yesterday's numbers inside the "Money & register" tab for quick comparison.
rpt.cmpDeltaOff: Pick "Today" in the period bar to see comparison percentages.

card.money: Register close, payment methods, debts, and revenue vs profit.
card.ledger: Every invoice and transaction — search, sort, print and export.
card.staff: Sellers leaderboard and a full performance profile per member.
card.best: Top clients and services, plus best and slowest sellers.
card.clinical: Imaging, lab tests and dispensed medications in the period.
card.audit: Security log: deleted invoices and sign-ins.

rpt.profitLocked: Profit and cost data is available to holders of the "view profits" permission.
rpt.debtsEmpty: No outstanding debts — every sale is fully paid.
rpt.staffVisitsHint: Counted by consultations recorded per doctor (revenue is not linked to a doctor in the system).
rpt.speciesHint: Visit distribution by species — sales in the system are not linked to a species.
rpt.medsHint: How many times each medication was dispensed in the period, and how many doses were actually given (vs planned).
rpt.deletedHint: A security log of permanently deleted invoices and who deleted them.
rpt.loginsHint: The latest sign-ins to the system.
rpt.noStaffMatch: No staff member matches your search.
rpt.staffSearchPh: Search by staff name or item…
rpt.emptyLedger: No financial transactions in this period.
rpt.ledgerSearchPh: Search by invoice number or customer name…
rpt.emptyVisits: No visits recorded in this period.
rpt.emptyClients: No sales to registered clients in this period.
rpt.emptyServices: No invoiced services in this period.
rpt.emptyMeds: No medications dispensed in this period.
rpt.emptyDeleted: No deleted invoices in this period.
rpt.emptyLogins: No sign-ins recorded in this period.

exp.title: Cash expenses & withdrawals
exp.descPlaceholder: e.g. shop rent, salaries, cleaning supplies…
exp.needDesc: Enter what it was spent on

act.title: Activity log
act.subtitle: Everything that happened in the clinic — who did it and when.
act.retention: Only the last 30 days are kept — older entries are deleted automatically
act.noAccess: The activity log is available to the clinic manager only.
act.searchPh: Search by action, staff or pet name…
act.empty: No activity recorded yet — every new action will appear here instantly.
act.reportCsv: Exported a CSV file from reports
act.invPreprint: Printed a pro-forma invoice (before sale) for {{total}}
act.ovUnlock: Unlocked manager mode with the PIN
act.ovDevLock: Locked this device to the reception view
act.ovDevUnlock: Released the reception lock on this device

override.title: Manager mode
override.lockedOut: Too many wrong attempts — locked for {{n}} minutes
override.noPin: No PIN set yet — the manager sets it in Settings
override.audit: Every unlock attempt — right or wrong — is recorded in the activity log.
override.cardHint: A small key icon next to the theme/language buttons: staff enter the PIN to see the manager screens for ten minutes, or lock the reception device into a limited view that the PIN reopens. Every use is recorded in the activity log.
override.enableHint: Off by default — enabling shows the icon to staff and on locked devices.
override.pinHint: 4 digits — stored encrypted; never shown to anyone after saving.
override.pinFormat: The PIN must be exactly 4 digits
override.devLock: Lock this device to the reception view
override.devLockHint: For a reception device signed in with your account: reports and settings disappear from this device only, and your PIN brings them back for ten minutes whenever needed.
override.needPinFirst: Set the PIN first so you can unlock later.
